zh.Baddiley, Cheshire East, Cheshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭爾爾 易亞斯特
zh.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England: 英國爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl de Crewe於1270年出生在英國爾南特維其時，她的父親Thomas Crewe30歲，母親Avice26歲。她於大約1283年與William de Praers結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年在英國爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓享年26歲。

zh-hans.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England: 英国爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl de Crewe于1270年出生在英国爾南特維其时，她的父亲Thomas Crewe30岁，母亲Avice26岁。她于大约1283年与William de Praers结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年在英国爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crewe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crew
meanings: English: habitational name from Crewe in Cheshire or Crew in Cumberland, both named with Old Welsh criu ‘weir’. This denoted a wickerwork fence that was stretched across a river to catch fish.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl de Crewe was born in 1270, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Crewe, was 30 and her mother, Avice, was 26. She married William de Praers about 1283. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1296, in Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl de Crewe est née en 1270, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Crewe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Avice, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William de Praers environ 1283. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1296, à Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.Baddiley, Cheshire East, Cheshire, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl de Crewe 1270 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Crewe 30 und ihre Mutter Avice 26. Sie hat um 1283 William de Praers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1296 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Crewe è nata il nel 1270 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Crewe, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Avice, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William de Praers circa 1283. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1296, nel Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Creweが1270年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Thomas Creweは30歳，母Aviceは26歳であった。約1283年にWilliam de Praersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年にイギリスチェシュアイアアストン ビー スットオンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Crewe(이)가 1270년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Crewe(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1283년 William de Praers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 영국 체실르 애스턴 비 수턴에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Crewe nasceu em 1270, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Crewe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Avice, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Praers aproximadamente 1283. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1296, em Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ro.Baddiley, Cheshire East, Cheshire, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl de Crewe родилась в 1270 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Crewe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Praers около 1283 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1296 г. в местности астон би суттон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.
